compositionNotes: Outdoor tangled forest glade — natural arch of leaning ancient trunks instead of a cathedral nave.
Fallen moss-swallowed log + toadstools at the side; faint leaf-motif stained-glass segments in the upper canopy edges.
Lower-center mossy flagstone clearing is the battlefield stage — brighter than the framing trunks.
notes: Wild-boss variant sibling to cathedral_combat_bg_sylvani_001 (region arena).
